channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wrong path, 11th May
item.description:
My house was burgled, when I confronted the person in my rear garden they said they were on the footpath and they were right when I looked at the map here, so I have no grounds to ask the person who stole from me to leave my garden. they merrily hopped over the fence into the other garden on the official route. there's a tarmac path behind but that's not been mapped! mad.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Draycot Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Confusing signage, 11th May
item.description:
Can I walk around the edge of the circle on the left or just the right where the line is on the map? was told by someone to stick to the mapped line. on the other line it goes off the tarmac and I got muddy shoes. map isn't drawn very well.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keynsham Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on Springbank Way, near junction of Springbank Close, 11th May
item.description:
As above. This and at least 2 other holes, in Springbank Way, near the above junction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Springbank Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 11th May
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way edge deteration approx 700x500x40mm tarmac parch number 1 plus x2 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 11th May
item.description:
Tree appears to have Sooty Tree Disease. Please can this tree be looked at asap. I have concerns as the tree appears to be dead, it is quite large and if it fell it will cause serious damage if it hits anyone or anything.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 11th May
item.description:
Cut back hedgeto boundary approx 5 mts Standard TM required with fway closure With fway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faint and disappearing white road and parking markings on Lansdown Walk resulting in cars parking blocking off streets, 11th May
item.description:
The whole of lansdown walk white street and parking markings are very faint/ disappeared resulting in cars parking where there is no allocated parking space, which is meaning they are blocking some entrances to the off streets. In a case of any emergencies vehicles would struggle to pass and cars being left in undesignated sections of the road. This has been an ongoing issue for 18 months and getting significantly worse due to faint or non existing road markings.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Lansdown Walk, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 11th May
item.description:
Cut back hedgeto boundary approx 37 mts Stop and go TM required With fway closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: When pressing button - light around it doesn't always stay on - so green man signal doesn't always show when it is safe to cross, 11th May
item.description:
Traffic lights outside 198 Cheltenham Road - post on other side of the road homes the faulty pedestrian crossing light.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 11th May
item.description:
Please pass on to ahr for Reinstatement of new sign post
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Large & deep pothole preventing access from all but off road vehicles, 11th May
